old_value: {"id":"broadside-e37d.7","title":"HTTP signature generation and verification","description":"Implement in fieldwork::signatures. Generation: sign outbound POST requests (delivery, Accept activities) with actor's RSA private key per HTTP Signatures spec (draft-cavage-http-signatures). Verification: verify inbound inbox POSTs by fetching sender's public key from their actor document. Key fetch uses fieldwork::fetch with caching. Support Signature and (deprecated) Authorization header formats for interop with Mastodon.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","owner":"mark@wolfssl.com","created_at":"2026-07-17T22:38:39.389265954Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-17T22:38:39.389265954Z","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"broadside-e37d.7","depends_on_id":"broadside-e37d","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-07-17T22:38:39.396024164Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"},{"issue_id":"broadside-e37d.7","depends_on_id":"broadside-e37d.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-07-17T22:39:19.776862911Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"}]}

new_value: Persona CRUD with RSA 2048 keypair gen working. HTTP signatures sign/verify implemented.
